subcodes.first_line: Time and again hath mention of thee flowed forth from the Most Exalted Pen. God willing, thou shalt be illumined by the radiance of the Sun of divine knowledge and be detached from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکرر ذکرت از قلم اعلی جاری انشاء الله بانوار آفتاب معرفت منور باشی و از غیر
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
